What are you trying to do?

Source: vignettes/task-index.Rmd
task-index.Rmd

Desk reference · ~2 min to scan · needs: nothing · sandbox-safe: yes (reads a bundled file, nothing runs)

Every task below is a real one, generated from the same registry (inst/registry/task_map.yaml) that backs eri_task_map(). Find your task, then follow its Run call or its Guide. New to the package? Getting started is a better front door; this page is for when you already know what you’re trying to do and just need the entry point.

Category I want to… Run Guide
Get set up Install the package and connect to Azure, ODK, SharePoint, and Teams get_azure_storage_connection() guide
Get set up Learn the data-addressing vocabulary (channel vs. measure) eri_data_model() guide
Get set up Follow the paced new-analyst onboarding path eri_data_model() guide
Bring data into the system A monthly country report (CMR Excel workbook) eri_stage_cmr(country, period) guide
Bring data into the system A surveillance dataset (csv/xlsx from a country) eri_ingest(path, country, disease, data_source, data_type) guide
Bring data into the system ODK Central survey submissions eri_odk_sync(project_id, form_id) guide
Bring data into the system Manage ODK Central users and roles eri_odk_bulk_users(csv_path)
Bring data into the system Admin boundaries or population rasters eri_spatial_load(country, level) guide
Bring data into the system Compare a new pipeline’s output against a legacy one before trusting it eri_compare(new, old, by)
Check data quality and approve Review and approve a CMR workbook, interactively eri_dq_review(country, period) guide
Check data quality and approve QC a submission and give a country feedback run_dq_checks(data, schema) guide
Check data quality and approve Catch epidemiological anomalies (spikes, gaps) before analysis add_anomaly_pct_change(data, value_col, period_col, group_cols, year_col) guide
Check data quality and approve Fix or extend a DQ schema (allowed values, ranges) eri_dq_schema_edit(country, disease, data_source, data_type) guide
Work the backlog Find and close out failed or DQ log entries eri_logs(country, disease, data_source, data_type) guide
Work the backlog Reconstruct what happened to a dataset eri_audit(country, disease, data_source, data_type)
Work the backlog File or triage internal feedback tickets eri_feedback(message, area)
Work the backlog Share files via SharePoint or post to Teams eri_sharepoint_upload(local_path, site, folder_path) guide
Use approved data: query, analyse, report Answer an ad-hoc request with SQL eri_query(sql) guide
Use approved data: query, analyse, report See what’s in the catalog, or rebuild it eri_catalog_query(country, disease)
Use approved data: query, analyse, report Turn approved data into on-brand tables, plots, or decks eri_table(data, title) guide
Use approved data: query, analyse, report Summarise an approved survey (e.g. LF TAS) eri_lf_tas_summary(data, fts_col, rdt_col) guide
Use approved data: query, analyse, report Incidence, epiweeks, and epidemic curves eri_incidence_rate(cases, pop) guide
Run a research study Start or resume a research project eri_research_init(project_name, country, disease, description) guide
Run a research study Log progress and manage artifacts as you go eri_research_log(note)
Run a research study Snapshot data and tag a citable, reproducible version eri_research_tag(label)
Run a research study Pull or contribute a reusable research template eri_template_list()
Places and maps Reconcile free-text localities to admin units eri_spatial_reconcile(data, loc_cols, shapefile, admin_cols) guide
Places and maps Join points to admin units and map them eri_spatial_join(data, lat_col, lon_col, shapefile) guide
Places and maps Get population totals for an area eri_spatial_pop(shapefile)
Add a new country, disease, or data type Onboard a new surveillance country or disease eri_onboard_country(country_code, country_name, disease) guide
Add a new country, disease, or data type Onboard a new CMR-reporting country eri_onboard_cmr(country_code, country_name) guide
Add a new country, disease, or data type Contribute a schema or disease analytics to the package eri_schema_validate(schema_path) guide

Prefer the console? eri_task_map() prints this same tree interactively, grouped by category, with every reference function each task touches:

eri_task_map()

Developed by Nishant Kishore.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.1.
